emails.subject: Re: Idemitsu Kosan Co Ltd
emails.body: As discussed, here is the name of the Japanese counterparty that will be on credit's next approval matrix. Thanks. Forwarded by Lisa Lees/HOU/ECT on 10/23/2000 05:21 PM From: John Suttle 10/23/2000 04:38 PM

emails.subject: Re: Idemitsu Kosan Co Ltd
emails.body: Per Jane's email, I think we can definitely approve them to trade Japanese products. I want to confirm with her the approval for the rest of the products, tho I think they'll probably be OK too. So today, you could open them for Japan. Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 10/24/2000 10:27 AM Jane McBride@ENRON 10/23/2000 07:20 PM
